q: Which correctly lists the five components of a pain reflex arc in order?
options: Effector → Motor neuron → Integration center → Sensory neuron → Receptor
Receptor → Sensory neuron → Integration center (spinal cord) → Motor neuron → Effector
Receptor → Motor neuron → Brain → Sensory neuron → Effector
Sensory neuron → Receptor → Spinal cord → Gland → Motor neuron
explanation: A reflex arc flows: stimulus detected by receptor → signal carried by sensory (afferent) neuron → processed at spinal cord integration center → signal sent via motor (efferent) neuron → effector responds.
